title: gmelina palawensis
intro: Gmelina palawensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Palawan gmelina or Palawan gmelina tree. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Gmelina palawensis include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Gmelina palawensis often involve boiling the leaves in water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
